summary.intent: Implement the framework-agnostic LiveRegion core component (issue #211) in ars-components with a priority queue, typed PendingEffect, and connect API attributes, following the repo's mandatory TDD and post-implementation audit workflow.
summary.outcome: LiveRegion core was fully implemented and verified (unit, spec-conformance, proptest, llvm-cov, cargo-mutants 0 missed); utility snapshot directories were split per-component; delay field was changed to Duration; Codex review findings were addressed and fix commit pushed to PR #659.

repo: All time-related fields must use core::time::Duration, not u32 milliseconds — this is a hard consistency requirement enforced by code review.
Utility agnostic modules use foo/mod.rs + foo/snapshots/ layout, not a flat foo.rs with a shared utility/snapshots/ directory.
cargo xci-fast must pass before committing — it runs fmt, check, clippy, unit, integration, and adapter gates in sequence.
Post-implementation audit is mandatory before committing: spec drift check, llvm-cov with no uncovered source lines, and cargo-mutants with 0 missed.

cargo insta test --unreferenced=reject -p ars-components --features i18n --lib is the correct strict snapshot gate; without --features i18n, feature-gated highlight tests leave their snapshots unreferenced and the check fails.
GitHub issue must be moved to In Progress on project board fogodev/2 before touching tracked files.
PRs with .snap changes require the snapshot-reviewed label; @codex review comment triggers the Codex review bot.
Context types are initialized through Machine::init, not Default — tests must use the machine-initialized context as a base.
aria-relevant attribute must be omitted entirely when empty, not set to an empty string.
During a re-queue Rendered transition, already-rendered messages must be preserved while the next pending message is announced, not cleared eagerly.

code.finding: has_announcements helper and Idle+Clear guard had a test gap: Clear from Idle must also wipe already-rendered messages, not be a complete no-op. Both proptest invariant checking and cargo-mutants independently caught this.

Two Codex review bugs: aria-relevant was emitted even when empty (should be omitted), and messages were cleared before the next queued announcement was set as pending (should be preserved until next Rendered event).
Proptest strategy for delay must produce Duration::from_millis() values, not raw u32, after the public Props type was changed.

workflow: TDD red-green cycle: confirm tests fail for the right reason before implementing — avoids false green and catches API shape mismatches early.
cargo-mutants run after coverage; surviving mutants directly drove new test additions that exposed real logic gaps (has_announcements guard, sequence number assertions).
Codex review polling via a shell while-loop checking reactions and unresolved GraphQL threads works but takes 10-15 minutes per pass.
Spec and both adapter specs must be updated in the same PR as the core implementation; the mandatory post-audit spec-drift pass is what surfaces this.
cargo insta accept must run before the --unreferenced=reject gate to avoid rejecting intentionally new snapshots.

friction: zsh word-splitting caused the first bulk component rename loop to create one directory named as the entire space-joined string instead of per-component directories; required rewriting with an explicit zsh array and setopt null_glob.
A git index.lock appeared mid-session during bulk git mv operations and had to be manually removed after confirming no active git processes.
cargo insta positional test filter is unsupported in the installed insta version; required switching to --glob-filter or running the full lib suite to get the snapshot gate to work.

cargo insta --unreferenced=reject silently fails on the default feature set because highlight snapshots are behind the i18n feature; the i18n flag is non-obvious and not documented near the insta invocation.
TransitionPlan field name was assumed incorrectly on the first test compile, causing a red-for-wrong-reason failure that required an extra debug round-trip.
open_items: Leptos adapter wrapper component for LiveRegion not yet implemented — only the agnostic core was in scope for #211.
Dioxus adapter wrapper component for LiveRegion not yet implemented — same scope boundary.
Second Codex review pass after the fix commit was still pending when the transcript ended — approval status unknown.
18 unviable mutants in the cargo-mutants run were not investigated; they may indicate dead code or unreachable branches worth reviewing.
